notes: Validates APIM-shaped set-variable plus templated downstream header mutation.
Validates outbound query mutation using APIM-compatible set-query-parameter syntax.
Validates templated set-body request mutation without requiring APIM expressions.
Adapted: include-fragment resolves against gateway policy_fragments config instead of APIM fragment resources.
Validates send-request callout plus response-based branching without broad expression support.
Validates response-aware deferred by-key throttling and custom response headers.
Adapted: prefer-external caching-type resolves to the simulator's local internal cache.
Adapted: value cache uses the simulator's local in-memory cache.
External cache backends remain intentionally unsupported.
